of the two persons) (i.e. husband or wife) who is more stubborn
and who is the quarrel-picker. Thus, the astrologer may be able

8 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI AS1ROLOGY
to plug the more adamant and atrocious one, by suitable advice,
which may ultimately help both, for running a smooth fanrily in
future. Sometimes, an astrologer may have to give such
suggestion which may be a bit of lie. But it does not matter as long
as the husband and wife stop quarrelling and there is reunion
between them. This is the duty of an astrologer. The astrologer
may suggest either to the wife or to the husband (depending on
their planetary aspects) to chant some mantras daily or to do some
parayana, to lead them towards divinity. Astrologer may also
advise that the husband and the wife must chant the prayers
together, to get fruitful results, so as to impose some pressure, for
the cause of a good result. Astrologers do come across various
